name: Runick Golden Droplet
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>黄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>雫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しずく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神碑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ルーン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Activate 1 of these effects, but skip your next Battle Phase after activation;
● Your opponent draws 1 card, then you banish the top 4 cards of their Deck.
● Special Summon 1 "Runick" monster from your Extra Deck to the Extra Monster Zone.
You can only activate 1 "Runick Golden Droplet" per turn.
eff:

You can only activate 1 "Runick Golden Droplet" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes from the top of your opponent's Deck
